author: y4rr
content:
Phase 3 complete. APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Diff (uncommitted, ready):
- ferrotorch-vision/src/models/vit.rs (+9/-29): PatchEmbed permute migration to view().permute().contiguous()
- ferrotorch-vision/src/models/convnext.rs (+15/-51): nhwc_from_nchw + nchw_from_nhwc helpers migrated; bodies are now 1-line permute().contiguous()
- ferrotorch-vision/src/models/swin.rs (+34/-83): 4 production permute sites migrated
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/probe_permute_migration.rs (NEW, +280): 5 probes proving manual-loop = primitive-chain elementwise
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs (+209): 12 new value-parity tests for ViT/ConvNeXt/Swin (1 main + 4 probes each)
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance/fixtures_value_parity.json (+616): 3 new descriptors
- scripts/regenerate_vision_fixtures.py (+126/-26): 3 new builders + int-buffer-skip generalization
- CHANGELOG.md (+3): citing migrations and #986/#987 closure

Probe-before-fix passed (5/5) BEFORE any model code was edited.

Per-model outcome:
- ViT-B/16: REPORTED — surprise schema-naming divergence (encoder.layers.encoder_layer_<N>.* vs blocks.<N>.*). Filed as #999. Architecture/math may be aligned; only naming differs. Likely solvable via remap table — much lighter than ConvNeXt/Swin.
- ConvNeXt-T: REPORTED — depthwise convolution missing. Filed as #997.
- Swin-T: REPORTED — shifted-window attention missing. Filed as #998.
- Plus #1000 filed for non-permute CPU-pull patterns surfaced during work (cls_token concat, pos_embed broadcast, MLP unrolling, manual mean reduction).

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision: 681 passed, 0 failed, 42 ignored (10 bins all green; resnet50_value_parity still passes; new ViT/ConvNeXt/Swin tests #[ignore]'d with #999/#997/#998)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test probe_permute_migration: 5/5 pass
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty
- ConvNeXt/Swin production data_vec sites: 0 in permute-pattern (other CPU-pulls escalated)

#986 and #987 close in this commit (CPU-detour bug they describe IS fixed by the migration).

Phase 3 closed.
